name: spin-clash
description: Static single-player spinning-top arena battle prototype refactor.

scripts.check:syntax: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cp=require('child_process'); for (const name of fs.readdirSync('src')) { if (!name.endsWith('.js')) continue; cp.execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--check', path.join('src', name)], { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.preflight: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:repo && npm run check:docs && npm run check:localserver && npm run check:dom && npm run check:config && npm run check:arenas && npm run check:nextphase && npm run check:analytics && npm run check:storage && npm run check:combatschema && npm run check:collisionhelpers && npm run check:guard && npm run check:signatures && npm run check:combatintent && npm run check:localization && npm run check:naming && npm run check:ja-ruby && npm run check:battleperf && npm run check:roster && npm run check:encounter && npm run check:workshop && npm run check:settings && npm run check:roadrank && npm run check:providers && npm run check:debugservice && npm run check:debug && npm run check:debugruntime && npm run check:loadout && npm run check:routes && npm run check:routeflow && npm run check:shellpresentation && npm run check:session && npm run check:roundflow && npm run check:matchflow && npm run check:share && npm run check:ui && npm run check:proxyvisualflow
scripts.verify:release: npm run preflight && npm run build:static && npm run check:static
